description: Desired-state policy for skill inventory reports. This file is intentionally smaller than the generated inventory; it records only policy decisions.

gemini.notes: Gemini may discover .agents and .gemini skills, but only skill-finder should be enabled until the rest are reviewed.

shared_agents.notes: The shared .agents root is treated as a review surface. Additional skills can exist there, but the dry-run report should flag them unless they are explicitly allowed.

claude.notes: Claude personal skills are inventoried. OMC/plugin skills are external and should not be mirrored into personal skill folders.

codex.notes: Codex system skills and plugin cache are external inventory. Stale configured skill paths should be reported.

opencode.notes: Do not manage Opencode agents in v1. Report only local SKILL files and stale skill-path references.
